src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for SpringBootServletInitializer to reflect the package restructure in Spring Boot 2.x.
Update import for DefaultProfileUtil to reflect the package restructure in JHipster libraries.
Modernize Javadoc comments to use code formatting and correct capitalization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: * This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace verbose block comment with a concise single-line comment.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit Spring component scanning and auto-configuration annotations with the consolidated @SpringBootApplication annotation.
Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for the Environment bean.
Update imports to use the new tech.jhipster.config package structure instead of the old io.github.jhipster.sample.config.
Replace references to local Constants class with JHipsterConstants from the new library.
Remove the throws UnknownHostException declaration from main and handle the exception internally to simplify the method signature.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public static void main(String[] args) { ... try { ... } catch (UnknownHostException e) { ... } }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract application startup logging logic into a dedicated private method for better readability and maintainability.
Update server property keys to match Spring Boot 2.x conventions (e.g., server.servlet.context-path).
Remove dependency on Apache Commons Lang 3 if not strictly required by the new logic, or update its usage context.
Replace JHipsterProperties with ApplicationProperties in the configuration properties binding.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject on Environment field and added public LoggingAspect(Environment env) constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the newer Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...)) API instead of the older string array method.
Refactor AspectJ pointcuts to target Spring stereotypes and specific packages rather than broad package wildcards, improving precision.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced single loggingPointcut with springBeanPointcut (stereotypes) and applicationPackagePointcut (packages).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to reduce code duplication and ensure the logger matches the target class of the join point.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private Logger logger(JoinPoint joinPoint) method and replaced inline LoggerFactory calls.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify logging output by removing the declaring type name from log messages, as the logger itself is already scoped to the class.
Update imports to use the new JHipster configuration constants package structure.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final TaskExecutionProperties taskExecutionProperties; public AsyncConfiguration(TaskExecutionProperties taskExecutionProperties) { ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from custom JHipsterProperties to standard Spring Boot TaskExecutionProperties for thread pool configuration.
Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to reflect package restructuring in newer JHipster versions.
Remove unused imports and organize remaining imports according to standard conventions.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to improve testability and adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public CacheConfiguration(Environment env, ...) { this.env = env; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use setter injection with @Autowired(required=false) for optional dependencies like Registration, GitProperties, and BuildProperties.
Switch from using DiscoveryClient directly to using Registration for obtaining service ID, aligning with newer Spring Cloud patterns.
Update profile checking logic to use the new Profiles.of() API instead of the deprecated Constants string comparison.
Update Hazelcast configuration code to use the newer EvictionConfig API instead of deprecated direct setters on MapConfig.
Externalize Hazelcast cache settings (backup count, TTL) to JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them.
Introduce a custom KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator to ensure cache keys are unique across different builds/commits.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Bean public KeyGenerator keyGenerator() { return new PrefixedKeyGenerator(this.gitProperties, this.buildProperties); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor Hazelcast instance creation to check for existing instances and use the standard Hazelcast.newHazelcastInstance factory method.
Consolidate and update imports to use wildcard imports for Hazelcast config and remove unused specific imports.
Removed legacy login regex and various Spring profile string constants that are no longer used in the application.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted LOGIN_REGEX, SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT, SPRING_PROFILE_PRODUCTION, SPRING_PROFILE_CLOUD, SPRING_PROFILE_HEROKU, SPRING_PROFILE_SWAGGER, and SPRING_PROFILE_NO_LIQUIBASE.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Renamed the system account constant to a shorter name to align with updated usage patterns.
Applied minor code formatting changes to the private constructor.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment bean to align with modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public DatabaseConfiguration(Environment env) { this.env = env; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor H2 TCP server bean to use a helper class and dynamic port calculation instead of hardcoded arguments.
Update profile constant reference from local Constants class to tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove explicit Hibernate4Module bean definition, likely relying on auto-configuration or newer Jackson modules.
Remove unused imports related to Liquibase, Hibernate, and H2 Server classes that are no longer directly referenced.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for AsyncSpringLiquibase, Hibernate4Module, SpringLiquibase, Server, etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Framework 5.x requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: extends WebMvcConfigurerAdapter implements EnvironmentAware -> implements WebMvcConfigurer

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the EnvironmentAware interface implementation and associated property resolver logic as it is no longer needed or supported in the new configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implements EnvironmentAware, setEnvironment method, and RelaxedPropertyResolver field.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to use the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Remove the explicit name attribute from the @Bean annotation for localeResolver, relying on the method name instead.
Replace specific imports from org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation with a wildcard import.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed specific imports for InterceptorRegistry and WebMvcConfigurerAdapter, added wildcard import for org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.*

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated generic Spring constant with JHipster-specific constant for development profile.
Inject Environment into the bean method to pass it to the LoggingAspect constructor.
Pass the Environment instance to the LoggingAspect constructor to support new logging configuration logic.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring Boot best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed from @Inject fields to constructor parameters for JHipsterProperties, ObjectMapper, and BuildProperties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on javax.annotation.PostConstruct which is deprecated in Java 11 and removed in Java 11+ modules without explicit dependency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @PostConstruct annotation and moved initialization logic into the constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on javax.inject.Inject which is part of the Java EE API not included in standard Java 11 distributions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import javax.inject.Inject and replaced with constructor injection.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace manual Logback appender configuration with JHipster's centralized LoggingUtils helper methods.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced manual LogstashSocketAppender and AsyncAppender setup with addLogstashTcpSocketAppender and addJsonConsoleAppender from LoggingUtils.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Enable JSON formatted console logging based on application properties, a feature standardized in newer JHipster versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added conditional call to addJsonConsoleAppender if loggingProperties.isUseJsonFormat() is true.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Include application version from Spring Boot BuildProperties in logging context for better observability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Injected ObjectProvider<BuildProperties> and added version to custom fields map if available.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Allow logging configuration to be refreshed dynamically via Spring Cloud Config.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added @RefreshScope annotation to the LoggingConfiguration class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on Eureka instance ID for logging, simplifying the configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Value("${eureka.instance.instanceId}") and instance_id from custom fields.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Dropwizard Metrics servlet filter and servlet registration code that is no longer part of the standard JHipster configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for com.codahale.metrics, removed MetricRegistry and HazelcastInstance fields, and deleted the initMetrics method and its invocation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer with Spring Boot 2.x WebServerFactoryCustomizer or remove if unused.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implementation of EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer and the customize method, as the new Spring Boot 2.x API uses WebServerFactoryCustomizer (though not explicitly added here, the old interface is removed).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS filter registration to use new JHipster properties structure and add support for Swagger v3 and management endpoints.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed @ConditionalOnProperty to check CollectionUtils.isEmpty on allowed origins, and updated registered paths to include /management/**, /v3/api-docs, and /swagger-resources.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate H2 console initialization to a dedicated helper class instead of manual servlet registration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced manual ServletRegistration.Dynamic code with a call to H2ConfigurationHelper.initH2Console(servletContext).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch from field injection using @Inject/@Autowired to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced @Inject fields with final fields and added a constructor to initialize Environment and JHipsterProperties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the new Spring Boot 2.x Profiles API.
Fix potential logging issue with array arguments by casting to Object[] to ensure proper varargs handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed Arrays.toString(env.getActiveProfiles()) to (Object[]) env.getActiveProfiles() in the log.info call.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Removes the @Audited annotation from Hibernate Envers, likely due to dependency removal or configuration change in the migration.
Changes the date fields from ZonedDateTime to Instant to align with modern Java time API usage.
Updates the JPA column definition for created_date to use updatable=false instead of nullable=false.
Refines the class-level Javadoc comment for clarity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: * Base abstract class for entities which will hold definitions for created, last modified, created by, last modified by attributes.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reorders import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.*, javax.*, org.*).
